qry:select.name: WF
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL('
{%? ($CONSOLA/@DEBUG!='1') {% select WP.oi_wf, WP.c_wf, WP.d_wf, WP.e_version, WP.e_version_pub, WP.l_automatica
from wrk01_wf as WF, wrk01_wf as WP
where WF.c_wf=WP.c_wf and WF.e_version_pub=WP.e_version and WF.l_automatica=0 and WP.c_wf = {$SOURCE/@WF} %} {% select WP.oi_wf, WP.c_wf, WP.d_wf, WP.e_version, WP.e_version_pub, WP.l_automatica
from wrk01_wf as WP
where WP.l_automatica=0 and WP.c_wf = {$SOURCE/@WF} %} %}
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: ESTADOS
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select WE.c_estado, WE.d_estado from wrk01_estados as WE where WE.oi_wf = {$SOURCE/@oi_wf}
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: CAMPOS
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL('
select WG.c_var_group, WG.d_var_group, WV.c_var, WV.d_var, WV.c_type, WV.c_column, WV.c_column_desc, WV.e_order from WRK01_GROUPS as WG, WRK01_VARS as WV where WG.oi_wf = {$SOURCE/@oi_wf} and (WG.c_mode = \'MAIN\' or WG.c_mode = \'HIST\') and WG.oi_var_group=WV.oi_var_group and WV.l_show_console=1 order by e_order ASC
')/ROWS/ROW
